flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Cabarrus College of Health Sciences vs the 2018–2022 baseline (45.5% vs 62.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cabarrus College of Health Sciences rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $16.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cabarrus College of Health Sciences rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $16.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cabarrus College of Health Sciences fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
